title: Welcome to the Food Culture Research Club
overview: University student Mako Kawai lives a quiet life. Then one day, she's unexpectedly invited to join a club.

title: I Might Want to Cook
overview: Mako and the others are told they must hold an activity to show what their club is about or be disbanded!

title: My Money's Gone!
overview: Mako and the others decide to go out together on the weekend, but then Shinon's money for the trip disappears!

title: This Is Nana Hoshi
overview: Mako accidentally bumps into a scary girl after German class. Later, that same girl shows up at the club room!

title: Want to Go for a Drive?
overview: Kurea and Shinon get their licenses, so the club decides to go for a drive... but they end up on the freeway!

title: Could It Be I’ve Gained Some Weight?
overview: The club goes out for a day of shopping. When Mako tries on a skirt, she's shocked to find it doesn't fit!

title: I Don't Think I'll Ever Forget
overview: The club trip begins! After the train and sightseeing, they plan to use the outdoor oven. But then, it rains!

title: The Air Conditioner Is... Broken?
overview: Nana spots her escaped pet in the worst location. Then, one hot day, the club's air conditioner won't turn on!

title: Let's Try Running a Stall!
overview: The club decides to have a food stall at the university fair, which means Nana will have to help customers!

title: I'm Home
overview: The club takes a trip to Mako and Shinon's hometown. Mako is nervous about meeting her old friends again.

title: Are You Free for Christmas?
overview: Three of the club members study late and get locked in the building! Later, the club plans a Christmas party.

title: Thanks for the Feast!
overview: The club gathers to give their clubroom a New Year's cleaning. They reminisce and enter the new year together!
